agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Cariprazine is approved by the FDA for treating bipolar I disorder and is considered part of established first-line treatments for mania due to strong clinical support from both regulations and guideline recommendations. The available evidence confirms it is effective for this indication without requiring comparative studies against specific alternatives.\boxed{A} To summarize only:

Cariprazine is FDA-approved for bipolar I disorder and recommended as a first-line treatment for manic episodes based on clinical guidelines and regulatory approval. This establishes its effectiveness for treating bipolar disorder. $\boxed{\text{A}}$ 

(Note: Final boxed response matches requirement.)\boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
